plugins.name: ask
plugins.description: Ask a question and get an answer. Routes to a registered project via Claude Code or shows a native dialog for user input.

plugins.name: fetch
plugins.description: Pull source code into workbench/code/ for AI agent context. Accepts package names, git URLs, or GitHub shorthand with optional version pinning.

plugins.name: mcp
plugins.description: Manage MCP servers: add, list, remove, and sync server entries in Claude Code settings with secrets stored in the macOS keychain.

plugins.name: schedule
plugins.description: Install and manage macOS launchd scheduled jobs with cron-format schedules.
